Film - Class in com.myproject.MavenExamProject.model
The Film class represents a film entity with attributes such as title, genre, description, release year, and rating.
Film(String, String, String, int, String) - Constructor for class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.model.Film
Constructor for the Film class with parameters for title, genre, description, release year and rating.
FilmDAO - Class in com.myproject.MavenExamProject.model
Data Access Object (DAO) class that provides data access logic.
FilmDAO() - Constructor for class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.model.FilmDAO
 
FilmHandler - Class in com.myproject.MavenExamProject.controller
The FilmHandler class acts as a controller in an MVC architecture, handling interactions between the FilmsView (UI) and FilmDAO (data access) classes.
FilmHandler(FilmDAO, FilmsView) - Constructor for class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.controller.FilmHandler
Constructs a FilmHandler object and sets up listeners for user actions in the FilmsView.
FilmHandler.AddToListButtonListener - Class in com.myproject.MavenExamProject.controller
Inner class that handles the "Add film to my list" button action.
FilmHandler.ClearResultButtonListener - Class in com.myproject.MavenExamProject.controller
Inner class that handles the "Clear result" button action.
FilmHandler.DisplayAllButtonListener - Class in com.myproject.MavenExamProject.controller
Inner class that handles the "Display all films" button action.
FilmHandler.SearchButtonListener - Class in com.myproject.MavenExamProject.controller
Inner class that handles the "Search" button action.
filmsPage - Variable in class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view.MainView
 
filmsTable - Variable in class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view.FilmsView
 
FilmsView - Class in com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view
The class represents the user interface for displaying and managing a collection of films.
FilmsView() - Constructor for class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view.FilmsView
Constructs the FilmsView panel with all UI elements.
formatReviews() - Method in class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.controller.ReviewHandler
method that takes in an arraylist of all current reviews and formats them as a String for the JTextArea
FrontPage - Class in com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view
The class represents the user interface for the front page of the application It provides the user with the application name and its features.
FrontPage() - Constructor for class com.myproject.MavenExamProject.view.FrontPage
Constructor initializing the method in the class, creating the front page content
